industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Guangxi Guidong Electric Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangxi Guidong Electric Power Co., Ltd. together with its subsidiaries, engages in the supply of electric power in China. It is also involved in securities, oil trading, and other activities. As of December 31, 2018, the company had an installed capacity of 377,600 kilowatts. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hezhou, China. Guangxi Guidong Electric Power Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Guangxi Zhengrun Development Group Co., Ltd.
